Public Class PolicyAssignmentIdentity Implements IJsonModel(Of PolicyAssignmentIdentity), IPersistableModel(Of PolicyAssignmentIdentity)
type PolicyAssignmentIdentity = class interface IJsonModel<PolicyAssignmentIdentity> interface IPersistableModel<PolicyAssignmentIdentity>

Docs.summary: Identity for the resource. Policy assignments support a maximum of one identity. That is either a system assigned identity or a single user assigned identity.

member this.TenantId : Nullable<Guid>

Docs.summary: The tenant ID of the resource identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

MemberSignature.Value: public Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.Models.PolicyIdentityType? Type { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.Models.PolicyIdentityType> Type
Public Property Type As Nullable(Of PolicyIdentityType)
member this.Type : Nullable<Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.Models.PolicyIdentityType> with get, set

Docs.summary: The identity type. This is the only required field when adding a system or user assigned identity to a resource.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.Models.PolicyUserAssignedIdentity> UserAssignedIdentities { get; }
.property instance class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.Models.PolicyUserAssignedIdentity> UserAssignedIdentities
Public ReadOnly Property UserAssignedIdentities As IDictionary(Of String, PolicyUserAssignedIdentity)
member this.UserAssignedIdentities : System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Policy.Models.PolicyUserAssignedIdentity>

Docs.summary: The user identity associated with the policy. The user identity dictionary key references will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}'.
